alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel ν
⊢ iIndepFun (fun p => rewardByCount p.1 p.2) (Bandit.measure alg✝ ν✝)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
classical
  -- `rewardByCount a 0` is a constant, so it can be ignored for independence.
  have h0 : ∀ a : α, rewardByCount a 0 =ᵐ[𝔓] (fun _ ↦ 0) := by
    intro a
    filter_upwards [ae_of_all _ (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount_zero (a := a) (ω := ω))] with ω h
    simpa using h
  have hindepPos :
      iIndepFun (fun p : α × ℕ ↦ rewardByCount p.1 (p.2 + 1)) 𝔓 := by
    -- reduce to the family `a ↦ (n ↦ rewardByCount a (n+1))`
    have h_a : ∀ a : α, iIndepFun (fun n : ℕ ↦ rewardByCount a (n + 1)) 𝔓 := by
      intro a
      exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount' alg ν a
    -- then use iIndepFun over a product index set
    simpa [iIndepFun, Function.comp] using (iIndepFun_prod_of_iIndepFun_fun (μ := 𝔓) h_a)
  -- now transfer back from `(n+1)` to `n`, using `n=0` case as constant
  refine (hindepPos.ae_eq_of_forall_ae_eq ?_).trans ?_
  · intro p
    cases' p with a n
    cases n with
    | zero =>
      simpa using (h0 a)
    | succ n =>
      exact (ae_of_all _ (fun ω ↦ by rfl))
  · simpa using hindepPos
